prestazioni: Engine swap to a highly modified **Comotor 624** (M35) Wankel rotary, bored to 1050cc (64.1 cu in) per rotor with custom forged internals from **OS Giken** (Japan), including billet eccentric shafts, apex seals in **tungsten-carbide-coated titanium**, and a dry-sump lubrication system by **Moroso** to prevent oil starvation under lateral G-forces. Compression ratio increased to 10.5:1 via custom rotor housings machined by **RE Amemiya** (Japan), paired with a **Garrett GTX3582R** turbocharger (1.05 A/R turbine housing) running 2.2 bar (32 psi) of boost, fed by a **Radium Engineering** dual-catch-can setup to manage oil dilution.

Fuel system overhaul with **Bosch Motorsport** 044 high-flow fuel pumps (dual setup), **ID1700x** injectors, and a **Haltech Elite 2500** standalone ECU mapped by **Rotary Aviation** (UK) for Wankel-specific ignition timing (30° BTDC peak advance) and sequential fuel injection. Exhaust system replaced with a **Schoenfeld** 3.5" stainless steel header (equal-length 4-2-1 design) merging into a **SuperSprint** 76mm dual-exit center muffler with **Inconel 625** internal baffles for heat resistance and weight savings.

Drivetrain reinforcement with a **PPG** 5-speed dog-ring gearbox (GS Birotor-specific ratios: 2.52, 1.82, 1.35, 1.09, 0.89) paired to a **Tilton** triple-plate carbon clutch and a **Quaife** ATB differential (80% lockup). Suspension replaced with **Ohlins** TTX40 coilovers (24-way adjustable damping, 30mm front/25mm rear ride height reduction) and **Eibach** ERS Pro springs (120 N/mm front, 100 N/mm rear), complemented by **Whiteline** adjustable sway bars (24mm front, 22mm rear) and **SuperPro** polybushings for the **Citroen SM-derived** hydropneumatic rear trailing arms.
estetica: Bodywork modified with a **Liberty Walk** GS-specific widebody kit (hand-laid carbon fiber, 120mm front/140mm rear fender flares) paired with a **Seibon** carbon fiber hood (dual NACA ducts for brake cooling) and **Rocket Bunny** ducktail spoiler (adapted from the **Pandem RX-7** kit). Front bumper replaced with a **Charge Speed** GS Birotor-specific aero splitter (3D-printed ABS with integrated **AEM** water/methanol injection nozzles) and **Voltex** Type-3 canards (300mm length).

Wheels upgraded to **Work Emotion CR Kiwami** 16x9.5" (ET15) front and 16x11" (ET5) rear, wrapped in **Toyo R888R** 225/50R16 (front) and 275/45R16 (rear) tires. Brake system features **Brembo** 4-piston calipers (GSX-R1000-derived) with **DBA** 5000-series rotors (355mm front, 330mm rear) and **Goodridge** braided stainless steel lines. Wheel arches lined with **APR Performance** GT-250 carbon fiber fender vents for heat extraction.

Interior stripped and reinforced with a **Sparco** Pro2000 carbon fiber bucket seat (FIA 8862-2009 certified) mounted on **Schroth** 6-point harnesses, paired with a **MOMO** Prototipo steering wheel (350mm diameter, suede-wrapped) on a **NRG** quick-release hub. Dashboard replaced with a **AIM MXS Strada** digital dash (Wankel-specific oil pressure/temperature sensors) and **Defi** BF gauges (boost, AFR, fuel pressure) mounted in a **Custom Cages** aluminum A-pillar pod. Roll cage by **Custom Cages** (T45 steel, 6-point design with integrated harness bar) and **Wilwood** brake bias adjuster.
